title: coccinia quinqueloba
intro: Coccinia quinqueloba, also known as the five-angled ivy gourd or baby woodrose, is a type of flowering vine native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coccinia quinqueloba include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and is also consumed as a raw vegetable or used in traditional Ayurvedic remedies.
